third-party.intro: We believe that 당신의 data belongs to you, and that you should be able to synchronize it to other third party websites and help them do whatever they do best with it. We don't get paid for this, but we do get some exposure since they then talk about us :)

vs.pitch: Vicious Syndicate builds a weekly meta report that captures what the meta looks, using both data coming from thousands of 게임 and insights by top-level players. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
vs.next: If you decide to contribute to the vS Data Reaper Report, Firestone will anonymously send them info about 당신의 게임 (mostly the 카드 사용한 by each player and some meta data, like player ranks).

ooc.pitch: Out of Games is a Hearthstone 커뮤니티 site with articles, guides, 덱s, card database, and more. Syncing 당신의 card 컬렉션 to the site makes it easier to find 덱s to play. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
ooc.next: If you connect 당신의 Out of Games account, Firestone will send 당신의 컬렉션 data to Out of Games so you can use it online.
ooc.toggle-label: 표시 알림 when 컬렉션 is synchronizeed
ooc.title: Out of Games

hearthpwn.title: Hearthpwn
hearthpwn.pitch: Hearthpwn is one of the biggest 커뮤니티 websites that shares 덱s, articles, and more. Syncing 당신의 card 컬렉션 to the site makes it easier to find 덱s to play and view stats on 당신의 컬렉션. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hearthpwn.next: If you decide to sync to Hearthpwn, Firestone will send them 당신의 컬렉션 data, so you can view stats on 당신의 컬렉션.

d0nkey.pitch: hsguru.com is a fan website that gathers all 덱s from official Hearthstone competitions, as well as 덱s from streamers to allow anyone to easily find interesting 덱s to play. Synchronizing to hsguru.com will let you share 당신의 덱s with 당신의 audience (if you're a streamer) or will help them build a better database to provide more free services to the 커뮤니티. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
d0nkey.next: If you decide to sync to hsguru.com, Firestone will send them each game you play, which will appear in a specific section on the website (which is still under construction). The 리플레이s will be private by default, unless you're streaming at the same time. See the {{link}} for how to set everything up.

hsdecks.pitch: Hearthstone-덱s.net shares 덱s 사용한 at High 전설 for all constructed modes, News & Articles. You can visit them {{websiteLink}}
hsdecks.next: If you decide to sync to hearthstone-덱s.net, Firestone will send them each game you play anonymously with some info about 당신의 게임 (덱 Code, Rank, Game Results)

At the end of every two weeks, 2 winners will be picked at random (the more points you have, the more chances you have to win). The winners will get a 2-month 프리미엄 subscription, and will be announced on {{twitterLink}} and {{discordLink}}.

Some of that data is cached locally to improve the loading time of the app and reduce the bandwidth usage. You can however force a refresh of that data with the buttons below, typically after you've switched computers.
